# Volvox

> Volvox is an AI-powered Discord bot for modern communities. It provides intelligent moderation, AI chat, dynamic welcome messages, spam detection, configurable auto-mod, and a fully featured web dashboard for server management.

Volvox combines large language models with community governance to give server admins powerful, configurable tools that scale from small friend groups to large public servers.

## Documentation

- Documentation: https://docs.volvox.bot
- Dashboard: https://volvox.dev
- Privacy Policy: https://volvox.dev/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://volvox.dev/terms

## Features

- AI Chat: Conversational AI powered by configurable LLM providers with context-aware responses
- Smart Moderation: Automated content moderation with configurable rules, spam detection, and audit logging
- Welcome System: Dynamic welcome messages with rich embeds and auto-role assignment
- Ticket System: Support ticket creation and management with configurable categories
- XP & Levels: Gamification with configurable experience points, level-ups, and rewards
- Web Dashboard: Full-featured dashboard for configuration, analytics, moderation logs, and member management
- Anti-Spam: Multi-layer spam detection including rate limiting, content analysis, and pattern matching

## Optional

- Source Code: https://github.com/VolvoxLLC/volvox-bot
- Support Discord: https://discord.gg/volvox
